# Pontera Studios

> Custom software development and web development studio based in the Waterloo Region, Ontario, Canada.

## About

Pontera Studios is a boutique software development agency. We build custom web applications, websites, iOS apps, and AI-powered automation for businesses. Every developer is local to Ontario with 10-15 years of experience. We never offshore.

## Services

- Custom Web Applications: Full-stack apps built from scratch with modern frameworks and relational databases.
- Custom Website Development: Performance-optimized websites with headless CMS integration. No WordPress, no templates.
- Landing Pages: Conversion-focused pages for campaigns and lead generation.
- SEO & Web Optimization: Technical SEO audits, Core Web Vitals optimization, structured data implementation.
- iOS Development: Native iOS apps from concept to App Store.
- AI Integration & Automation: AI chatbots, internal knowledge search, API integrations, workflow automation.

## Contact

- Website: https://slatecode.dev
- Contact: https://slatecode.dev/contact
- Location: Waterloo Region, Ontario, Canada
